entities.name: ZIMBABWE
entities.description: A country in south west Africa where climate change adaptation planning is urgent

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: The long-term shift in temperatures and weather patterns affecting agricultural systems

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE ADAPTATION PLANNING
entities.description: The process of planning to adjust agricultural practices to the effects of climate change

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The practice of farming, including crop cultivation and livestock rearing

entities.name: FOOD SYSTEMS TRANSFORMATION
entities.description: The process of changing food systems to be more sustainable and resilient

entities.name: SCIENCE
entities.description: The systematic study used to inform adaptation planning

entities.name: POLICY MAKING
entities.description: The process of formulating policies to guide agricultural adaptation

entities.name: MIXED CROP-LIVESTOCK SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural systems that integrate both crop production and livestock rearing
